sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113524" key="xeilofu/lac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χειλοφύλαξ</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾰκος</itype><sense id="n113524.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"><cit TEIform="cit"><quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">, ὁ</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bandage for the lips,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:48:35" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">48.35</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
